creator: paulbeard@gmail.com
text:
Also an issue with openldap24-client

===>  Installing for openldap24-client-2.4.59_2
===>  Checking if openldap24-client is already installed
===>   Registering installation for openldap24-client-2.4.59_2
Installing openldap24-client-2.4.59_2...
pkg-static: openldap24-client-2.4.59_2 conflicts with openldap-client-2.4.59 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/ldapadd
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/net/openldap24-client


portmaster openldap24-client 

===>>> No valid installed port, or port directory given
===>>> Try portmaster --help
